title: Classic Splashes
description: Relive the nostalgia! This pack restores every yellow splash text from the Legacy Console Edition, bringing that classic console charm to Java.
body:
Bring back the nostalgia!

The **Classic Splashes** resource pack restores all of the iconic **yellow splash texts** that appeared under the Minecraft logo in the **Legacy Console Edition**. From quirky jokes to classic references, every familiar phrase returns—just like the good old days on Xbox, PlayStation, and Wii U.

✅ Works in **Minecraft: Java Edition**

✅ 100% authentic Legacy Console splash texts

✅ Perfect for players who miss the **classic feel** of old-school Minecraft menus

Relive the charm of the past—one splash at a time! 🌟
